name: Verify Profile interactions and log out
description: Starts from an authorized state, opens Profile, verifies visible Profile actions, safely cancels destructive account deletion, and logs out.
descriptionHtml: Starts from an authorized state, opens Profile, verifies visible Profile actions, safely cancels destructive account deletion, and logs out.

testStage.description: Starts from an authorized state, opens Profile, verifies visible Profile actions, safely cancels destructive account deletion, and logs out.

steps.name: Verify that the authorized dashboard is displayed
Return to Profile screen from an internal Profile screen
Return to Profile screen from an internal Profile screen
Open Terms and privacy policy from Profile
Verify Delete Account confirmation and cancel it
Confirm logout if confirmation dialog appears
